title: Create User Accounts
description: _TODO: Add description for Create User Accounts.

topics.title: Overview

content.text: Each Windchill user has a user account that includes user information, credentials, and an email address. Windchill maps access privileges for users through user accounts.

The user account can be created in Windchill by a site or organization administrator. If your Windchill is connected to a corporate directory, a login attempt will also create the user account . In either case, the user account must be assigned a Windchill license group.

topics.title: Exercise — Access a Utilities Page

content.text: In this exercise you will access a Utilities Page.

content.title: Access a Utilities Page
content.objective: Complete the access a utilities page procedure.

steps.action: Click the Browse link on the Navigator to expand it.
Click the Organizations icon.
Click the Expand icon next to your organization.
Click the Utilities link.

keyTakeaways: _TODO: Add 3-4 key takeaways for this exercise.

topics.title: Exercise — Create the User Account for the Organization Administrator

content.text: In this exercise you will create the User Account for the Organization Administrator.
Although not required, features that enable search, create privileges, and assign members require that users have an email address defined here.

content.title: Create the User Account for the Organization Administrator
content.objective: Complete the create the user account for the organization administrator procedure.

tasks.title: Create the User Account for the Organization Administrator

steps.action: Click the Participant Administration link in the Business Administration section of the Utilities page.
Click the Create new user icon at the top of the Users table in the Participant Administration table.
Type a username in the Name field.
Fill in the Full Name, Last Name, Email, password, and password confirmation fields of the New User window.
Click Finish to create the new user.

keyTakeaways: _TODO: Add 3-4 key takeaways for this exercise.

topics.title: Exercise — Add a User to the List of Organization Administrators

content.text: In this exercise you will add a User to the List of Organization Administrators.

content.title: Add a User to the List of Organization Administrators
content.objective: Complete the add a user to the list of organization administrators procedure.

tasks.title: Add a User to the List of Organization Administrators

steps.action: Expand the Navigator.
Expand your organization.
Click the Administrators link for your organization.
Click the Add Users to the Administrators Group icon at the top of the Organization Administrators table.
Click Search.
Select a name from the search results.
Click Add >>.
Click OK to add a user to the Administrators group.

keyTakeaways: _TODO: Add 3-4 key takeaways for this exercise.

topics.title: Exercise — Add User to a License Group

content.text: In this exercise you will add User to a License Group.

A license group represents a usage scenario and access control rules. A license profile enables or restricts user access to Windchill features. Every license group member is assigned with an individual license profile.
The Profile Actions table indicates the actions available to users in this group. Click the Actions link at the top of the Details tab to view the Profile Actions table.
_TODO: This section originally included a video demonstration. Consider adding screenshots or additional step-by-step detail.

content.title: Add User to a License Group
content.objective: Complete the add user to a license group procedure.

tasks.title: Add User to a License Group

steps.action: Click Browse on the navigator bar.
Click the Profiles link to view the profiles page.
In the License Profile table find the desired license group.
Click the View information icon to the right of your group’s license profile.
Click Members of Profile link to bring you to the Profile Members table.
In the Profile Members table, click your license group link.
Click Actions at the top of the page.
Select Edit Group.
Click Next.
Click the Add members to group icon.
Use the Find Participant window to find your user.
Select your user and click Add>> to add the user the Participant List.
Click OK to add member and close the participant window.
Click the Finish button to close the Edit Group window.
